properties.entry: Double-check your Password to keep your personal Information safe.
Always be careful not to expose your Password to others.
* Enter it correctly as it is Used as a means for authentication.
Double-check your Password to keep your personal Information safe.
Always be careful not to expose your password to others.
Enter the ID / Password of www.webfax.uplus.co.kr site
The E-mail address and Password entered will be kept during the period of using the service.
Mix 3 Types of English (capital), English (small), numbers, and special characters (8-20 characters)
Mix 3 Types of English (capital), English (small), numbers, and special characters. (8-20 characters)
Password to be changed is the same as the existing password.
Password to change and Confirm Password not match.
Use of personal information for marketing purposes
When selecting the default access address and the recipient clicks the download, a page says it is not a private connection, and once you click "Advanced" to move, it will not appear in the future..
The mail list area scrolls vertically, with the top filter and bottom page navigation buttons fixed.
Do you want to delete the Signature?
Do you want to delete all mails in the mailbox?
All mails in the mailbox deleted.
Depending on the amount of mails, the backup completion time is flexible, and when the backup is completed, the completion mail is automatically received. Do you want to proceed?
Mailbox name you entered already exists.
All mails in the Mailbox will be deleted. Do you want to delete the Mailbox?
If the subject of the mail
consists of only English letters and numbers
Do you want to delete the classification?
If the subject of the mail includes

Save the copy on the server
Do you want to delete the setting?
Available through SMS authentication. A mobile phone number must be set in your personal information.

To attach file, Please drag the file with the moUse and drop it on [My PC] IE : Supports higher than v.10 Firefox : Supports higher than v.4+ Chrome : Supports all Safari : Supports Mac OS only Opera : Supports all
Uploading is possible if the file extension is'.eml'.
There is no mailbox to save the mail.
POP server port is required field.
POP server port can only be entered with numbers.
Please Enter the name of new Mailbox.
Select the Copy on the surver.
Please agree to the use of account Information in External E-mail.
Do you want to save the Setting?
If the POP3 Setting of External mail to bring is incorrect or
the Information of the external account is incorrect, the account cannot be added.
Please check the Information and try again.
It is a type of security protocol Used by POP3. Check it when using Naver, Daum, or Nate.
Save the copy on the server
Yes (E-mails stored in External E-mails will be retained.)
No (Caution: All mail stored in External E-mail will be deleted.)
※ During Use of the Service, User ID and Password you entered are kept for External E-mail Connection.
There is no registered External mail.
You can check the history of Bring External mail.
X-X out of the total X
Proper size: 76 x 76 / Image format: jpg, gif / Capacity: less than 1MB
There is no set substitute approver. Do you want to designate the substitute approve?

Attaching Files and Locating Reference Documents
Reads at The Completion of a Document
If you click the department/Administrator, it will be added to the Approval Path.
Do you want to delete the approval path?
When the document is returned to the previous approval path
When the approval comment is registered
When you are designated as a CC
When you are designated as a viewer
When the approval opinion is registered
Classification is applied sequentially at the time of completion of the document, and up to three are applied.
who will be included in the drafter.
who will be included in the approver.
OR(satisfied with one thing, 2 or more option)
Enter the classification name to add.
At least one criteria must be a select.
Select the Board / Board box to add / modify and delete.
Registration is not possible because required fields are not entered.
Do you want to delete the board?
All posts in the board will be deleted.
Registration is not possible because required fields are not entered.
Do you want to delete the board box?
the board box and sub-board will be deleted together.
Display Main Notice in the All post
Not(Apply only to the All Post List.)
When the reply is registered to the post
Select the Business box to add / modify and delete.
Do you want to delete the business box?
When the content of the business is modified

Do you want to delete the Classification?
Due to changes in Google API policy, new Google Connection is not possible for the time being.
Even if you check 'Use', it is impossible to link in the Calendar Setting, and even if you already Used it, it is difficult to link again after canceling, so please consider carefully when canceling.
Select the Calendar to add / modify and delete.
Do you want to delete the calendar?
You cannot delete the primary calendar
Select the address to add / modify and delete.
All contact address in the Address book will be deleted. Do you want to delete the Address book?
Connection error occurred while loading card information. Please check again or contact customer service.
The person in charge of consultation can be designated as duplicate.
Selete the card want to delete.

Do you want to delete the account title?
Due to changes in Google API policy, new Google Connection is not possible for the time being.
Even if you check 'Use', it is impossible to link in the Calendar Setting, and even if you already Used it, it is difficult to link again after canceling, so please consider carefully when canceling.
When connecting directly to the WebHard, you can access and use the assigned WebHard ID and Works password.
You are not using WebHard additional services. Please apply to the customer center through the Works Adiminitrator.
You do not have the authority to use the WebHard Service. Please contact Administrator.
When connecting directly to the WebFax, you can access and use the assigned WebHard ID and Works password.
You are not using WebFax additional services. Please apply to the customer center through the Works Adiminitrator.
You do not have the authority to use the WebFax Service. Please contact Administrator.
When connecting directly to the E-Document service, you can access and use the assigned Administrator ID, User UD and Works password.
You are not using E-Document additional services. Please apply to the customer center through the Works Adiminitrator.
You do not have the authority to use the E-Document Service. Please contact Administrator.
